basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in ECE/EEE/EIE or equivalent + GATE/NET Qualified, M.E/M.Tech in ECE/VLSI and related areas with GATE/NET Qualified, MTech/BTech from CFTI with CGPA criteria
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech in ECE/EEE/EIE or equivalent + GATE/NET Qualified M.E/M.Tech (with GATE/NET Qualified) in ECE/VLSI and related areas MTech/BTech from CFTI with CGPA criteria

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, along with HRA and medical benefits.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E/B.Tech in ECE/EEE/EIE or equivalent with GATE/NET qualification, or an M.E/M.Tech in ECE/VLSI with GATE/NET, or an MTech/BTech from CFTI with CGPA criteria.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the JRF position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post announced by IIT Roorkee in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment is through email. Candidates are required to send their applications to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Roorkee provide age relaxation?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details on age relaxation.
